title: John Deere Names 2026 Technician of the Year Finalists
description_clean: John Deere has announced the finalists for its 2026 Technician of the Year Awards, with 30 regional finalists being named in five award categories. These include Agriculture & Turf Service Technician of the Year, Construction & Forestry Service Technician of the Year, Parts Technician of the Year, Service Apprentice of the Year and Parts Apprentice of the Year. Judges say the competition across all categories this year is among the strongest seen since the inception of the program in 2021, with finalists representing a mix of emerging talent and experienced professionals from dealerships acros

title: Federated Farmers: DOC must pay its way on pest control

title: SAM Machinery Reveals e-Spreader at Fieldays
description_clean: Kiwi built to suit Kiwi conditions, the Fieldays reveal of its new 3-point linkage mounted e-Spreader will add another string to Hamilton-based SAM Machinery’s already extensive portfolio of fertiliser spreading tools. Designed to be easy to use, future-proof and incorporating smart, intuitive technology, overall control is via SAM’s, ISOBUS-compliant display in the tractor cabin. At the heart of the machine, a hydraulically-driven floor at the base of the hopper will allow users to apply all types of fertiliser from uniform prills right through to bulk materials such as lime. Offering 2-click
summary: Hamilton-based SAM Machinery revealed its new 3-point linkage mounted e-Spreader at Fieldays, featuring ISOBUS-compliant control and a hydraulically-driven floor to apply various fertiliser types.

title: Stewart Trailers Unveils Tetrad 35-Tonne Trailer
description_clean: Founded in 1988, Stewart Trailers is owned and managed by James and Mandy Stewart from their site in North-East Scotland. At the country’s recent Highland Show, held over four days in Edinburgh, they showcased a new four-axle trailer, designed to carry a payload of thirty-five tonnes. Called the Tetrad, the first model has a minimum tractor power requirement of 300hp and an empty weight of around 12 tonnes and was developed primarily for the Australian market. The first of the new range is headed for a large dairy operation to of the country, which already operates 50m³ versions of the company
summary: Scotland's Stewart Trailers unveiled its new four-axle Tetrad trailer at the Highland Show, a 35-tonne payload model developed primarily for the Australian market with the first unit headed to a large dairy operation.

title: Can-Am Unveils Outlander Electric ATV at Fieldays

Offered to customers for the first time in Asia-Pacific, the all-new electric Outlander ATV has arrived with excellent timing, following the Government’s 2026 Budget commitment of $437 million over four years to accelerate the development, adoption and availability of new technologies and tools that help reduce on-farm emissions.
